# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
unlock_legionaries_1_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	allow_children	= no
	requires = iron_working
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
		has_or_had_tag = ROM
	}
}

	allow_children	= no

	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:greek_group }
	}
}
